results.title: Trump warns of possible US tolls in Strait of Hormuz if Iran agreement stalls beyond 60 days - DETAILS
results.description: Donald Trump has warned that the US may impose tolls on ships using the Strait of Hormuz if a final Iran agreement is not reached within the 60-day ceasefire period.

results.title: Maruti, M&M, Tata Motors eye UK EV market boost after India-UK trade pact
results.description: Indian automakers Maruti Suzuki, Mahindra & Mahindra and Tata Motors are eyeing UK EV exports after the India-UK FTA opened a phased duty-free access route for India-made electric vehicles.

results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Ongoing edition becomes second-fastest to 100 goals during Netherlands vs Sweden game
results.description: It was a goal fest in Houston on Saturday albeit one-sided, as Netherlands defeated Sweden 5-1 to get one step closer to the FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 32 stage.

results.title: JD(S) Youth Wing president leads padayatra against Bidadi land acquisition
results.description: Nikhil Kumaraswamy leads a padayatra in Bidadi against land acquisition for a township project, with farmers from 26 villages opposing the move.

results.title: Nifty Outlook for June 22: 24,000 remains the key for index as US-Iran uncertainties remain
results.description: The Nifty snapped its five-session winning streak on Friday, weighed down by a sharp selloff in information technology stocks. Despite the weakness, the benchmark managed to hold above the psychologically important 24,000 level and ended the week with gains of 1.65%.

results.title: India's ODI Squad vs England: Rohit Sharma, Virat Kohli Picked; No Yashasvi Jaiswal Even After Ton vs Afghanistan
results.description: The Men's Selection Committee on Sunday picked India's squad for the upcoming three-match ODI series against England

results.title: Bibi turns to bunker raids as IDF death toll rises amid a shaky Lebanon truce
results.description: Israeli forces have reportedly seized a major underground Hezbollah command center in southern Lebanon, according to Israeli media reports. The facility, allegedly built with Iranian support, was located near the strategic Ali Taher Ridge and is said to have played a key role in Hezbollah's military operations. The operation comes amid continued tensions along the Israel-Lebanon border despite a fragile ceasefire. Israeli media claims the IDF has begun dismantling the underground complex after securing the surrounding area, while reports suggest large numbers of Hezbollah fighters may have been inside the facility.
